title: Aindhaam Thalaimurai Sidha Vaidhiya Sigamani
overview: An uneducated and naive young man from a family of Siddha doctors wants to marry an educated woman so that he won't be cheated in life. He marries a girl lying that he is a doctor but the girl has her own secrets...
